title: WebSockets vs SSE vs Polling: Pick Fast
meta_description: Cut real-time transport choice from days to 90 seconds — latency, cost, and code differences for WebSocket, SSE, and long polling in 2026
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams default to WebSockets.

They end up rewriting it because the data was read-only.

Here is how to pick the right transport in 90 seconds 👇
